title: The New York Times — Breaking News, Top Stories & Investigations
description: T660 / T73 cycle 4: nytimes.com landing rebuilt as a Forge CmsPage. First NEWS-MEDIA category rebuild (prior 3 were dev-tools). Tests the LogoWall + Pricing + Quote dedup theory against a different vertical — news pages don't ship customer logos or pricing tiers, but DO ship article cards + bylines + datelines en masse.

sections.title: The Lede
sections.lede: Live coverage of the day's top stories — politics, conflict abroad, markets, climate, and the slow churn of the cultural beat. Every story sourced, datelined, and bylined.

sections.title: GAP-T660-NEW3 — ArticleCard (headline + dek + byline + dateline + thumbnail)
body: NYT's homepage is ~80% ArticleCards: a thumbnail, a headline, an optional dek (1-sentence summary), a byline (author + link to profile), and a relative dateline ('1h ago', '3 min read'). Forge's existing CardFeed handles title + sub + primary_link + avatar — close but doesn't model byline-vs-dek separately, and avatars are decorative-letter, not actual thumbnail images.

First news-media rebuild, so dedup count starts at 1-of-1 surfaces. Marketing/SaaS rebuilds (Stripe, Linear, Vercel) didn't need this. If a 5th rebuild (any news / blog / publication site) ALSO needs it, bump to 2-of-2 vertical-specific → bump T70 priority. Otherwise stay LOW.
Proposed shape: CmsSection::ArticleCard { headline: String, dek: Option<String>, byline: Author, dateline: Dateline, thumbnail: Option<CmsImage>, primary_link: NavLink, kicker: Option<String> }

Where Author = { name, profile_href, role? }, Dateline = { absolute_iso8601, relative_human, read_minutes? }, CmsImage = { src, alt, intrinsic_aspect }. The relative_human ('1h ago') is owner-input not derived — Forge isn't computing dynamic timestamps; for CMS-mode the editor types it.

items.title: Senate vote-counting drags as filibuster pushes confirmation hearings into next week

sections.body: Democracy doesn't fail at the polling station. It fails in the months between, when no one is paying attention to the things the polling station is supposed to settle.

sections.title: GAP-T660-NEW4 — Opinion lede + author-tagline pattern
body: NYT's Opinion section uses a tighter Quote shape: a short pull-quote + a byline that's tagged with 'Columnist' / 'Guest Essay' / 'Editorial Board'. The existing Quote variant (T660 P2 shipped this session) handles body + attribution + role — actually a clean fit! No new variant needed. Dedup confirmation: Quote on 4-of-4 rebuilds (Stripe + Linear + Vercel + NYT). LOCKS T660 P2 as load-bearing for ALL marketing+content site rebuilds going forward.

sections.title: The Coastal Authority Files
body: A six-month investigation into the Coastal Land-Use Authority and its dealings with private resort developers in three states. Documents obtained under FOIA, leaked internal memos, and on-the-record interviews with eleven former staff. Published in three parts; the first ran yesterday.
Part 1: 'How a sleepy regulator became a deal-making machine' — May 16.
Part 2: 'The $4.2bn in approvals the public never saw' — Monday.
Part 3: 'What the staff lawyers wrote, and what got published instead' — Wednesday.

items.value: EU and African Union joint statement: emissions target must be 'binding and verifiable'.
China's lead negotiator confirms attendance at the binding-target working group.
US delegation pushes for an opt-out clause covering 'critical-mineral supply-chain restrictions'.
Civil-society observers ejected from the plenary after protest banner unfurled.
Brazil's environment minister: 'No deal without Annex II reparations.'

sections.title: GAP-T660-NEW5 — Live-blog timestamp pattern
body: NYT's live-blog uses chronologically-ordered timestamp + paragraph pairs. The existing kv_pair variant (T660 P1) maps the data shape cleanly (key=timestamp, value=summary). The rendering hint is different though — live-blog wants vertical timeline with bullets/connectors, kv_pair wants two-column table. Style hint, not data-shape gap. PROPOSAL: an optional 'style: timeline | table | grid' field on kv_pair (additive, non-breaking) rather than a new variant. Not bumping T70 priority yet — needs 2nd-surface confirmation from another news/live-blog rebuild.

sections.heading: Recipes editors are cooking this week

sections.text: T660 cycle 4 (first news-media rebuild) confirmed: Quote variant is 4-of-4 universal across all rebuilds shipped this session (Stripe + Linear + Vercel + NYT). LogoWall is 3-of-3 marketing-only — NYT didn't surface it. ArticleCard surfaced as a NEW MED-priority gap specific to news/publication verticals.
